song.title: Precious Lord Take My Hand
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Precious Lord, take my hand, Lead me on, help me stand. I am tired, I am weak, I am worn.|| Through the storm, through the night, Lead me on to the light. Take my hand, precious Lord; Lead me home.
[V2] 2) When my way grows drear, Precious Lord, linger near— When my life is almost gone.|| Hear my cry, hear my call, Hold my hand lest I fall. Take my hand, precious Lord; Lead me home
song.author: Thomas A Dorsey
